core_principle.statement: UI is an engineering interface, not a marketing design surface.
core_principle.interpretation: Every interface element must behave like part of an architectural engineering system.

ui_philosophy.goal: Translate architectural system logic into digital interaction layers
ui_philosophy.anti_style: Reject decorative UI, lifestyle aesthetics, and marketing-driven design

grid_system.rule: All UI elements must align strictly to grid logic

design_fundamentals.visual_hierarchy: Engineering layer defines structure, architectural layer defines space, accent defines action

accent_layer.rule: Used only for interactive or transformation elements

typography_in_ui.rule: Typography is part of system structure, not decoration

buttons.accent_usage: Only primary CTA uses gold accent

interaction_design.principle: Every interaction must reflect system transformation logic

icon_integration.rule: Icons must behave like system diagrams

responsive_behavior.rule: No loss of hierarchy or grid structure on any screen size

user_perception: This is a technical system, not a marketing website
This company operates like an engineering platform

strategic_goal.objective: Create a digital interface that behaves like an architectural engineering system
strategic_goal.outcome: Users perceive AvizSazeh as a structured, reliable engineering authority
